name: Furion Chronicles 3
short_description: The story follows a young girl, Sigma, who is forced to become an adventurer, meet her companions, and eventually establish the Gallia Mercenary Corps in order to pay the dramatically increased poll tax in the Imperial Territories. However, the rapids of the times, what will ultimately await her?
detailed_description:
Game type:
SRPG

Game system:

Squad Battle
As a commander, being able to hire different mercenaries in levels, observing the enemy's status on the battlefield, and making good use of different types of mercenaries is the key to winning.
Weapon restraint system
There is a weapon restraint system in the game. When attacking the opponent, please pay attention to whether you are at a weapon disadvantage.
Commander Rewards
Defeating the commander of the opposing team will receive battlefield rewards. Prioritize defeating them to gain an advantage on the battlefield.
Difficulty system
The difficulty level of this game is relatively low. If you are an elite commander skilled in combat, you can choose the difficulty level to increase the challenge.
